description: Claude Agent SDK route for a local workspace or Obsidian vault.

permissions.name: network
permissions.reason: Call the configured Anthropic API through the Claude Agent SDK.

permissions.name: filesystem:read
permissions.reason: Read the user-configured workspace and input attachments.

permissions.name: filesystem:write
permissions.reason: Persist session state and write files requested by the user.

permissions.name: process:spawn
permissions.reason: Run the Claude Agent SDK executable and its approved tools.
